reviews.review_msg: Koopa's fast teaching style can get a bit hard to keep up with (especially for those taking his evening classes), but he's a pretty good instructor with clear explanations and doable assignments.
Amazing professor! Very patient and caring. Teaches not only the code but also the theory behind it.

Dude very clearly knows his stuff. Coding in this course is super math-based and it's pretty unlikely that you'll understand more than 80% of the stuff. If you don't make sure you understand the weekly topics, you WILL be dragged behind. Do the lab exercises instead of talking to your friends

You will get partial credit for incomplete test answers

He's the best instructor I met so far he usually shows you how to prove the rules in class. It's a little bit boring but it really help me with further study. Though you might not follow in the class just go through the book ez a+ in the exam.  The only instructor that is better than him is Jamie. They are the best in low-level math courses.
Koopa does go fast in his lectures, but he is great explaining all the topics in detail. He is a very smart professor. Just do his homework and pay attention to his classes, and youll do good.
